reviewer.evidencePolicy: Mark the broad master-plan packet route claim satisfied only through representative core command surfaces; do not infer every command has identical resume semantics.

claimUpdates.whyThisLayer: The claim names packet shape, provenance, status-summary, and bounded next-work route behavior that is protected by deterministic CLI and runtime tests.
claimUpdates.evidenceStatusReason: Verified by representative command and runtime tests plus live CLI probes showing schema-versioned command, doctor, claim-status, validation, and eval-plan packets with git provenance, status summaries, action buckets, cross-cutting signals, and recommended next actions.
claimUpdates.nextAction: Keep representative packet route tests current when command packet schemas, claim status summaries, or next-work routing fields change.
